untranslatable_reason: Descending Broadening Formation requires detection of specific pattern geometry: horizontal top trend line, series of lower lows on bottom edge, and megaphone shape. These geometric properties cannot be expressed using only point-in-time price/indicator values and basic comparison operators. Would require trend line fitting, lower-low detection logic, and pattern shape validation which are not available in the allowed indicator set.
translation_notes: Attempted proxy using Donchian channels (dc_upper/dc_lower) to approximate breakout detection above/below formation boundaries, but this does not capture the essential pattern structure. Author silent on success rates, volume trends, and pullback characteristics. A proper implementation would need custom pattern recognition logic outside the scope of these indicators.
